title: anima-v3 — Architecture
ssot_note: JSON=SSOT (AI/tool parse); humans view architecture.html via `python3 serve.py`. Update in-place (not append). History/decisions/dates → CHANGELOG.md + git (never in tree). Hierarchy decomposes via `children` (commons single-doc); one fact per node, deeper detail → child nodes.

children.role: Where does aliveness live — 8 clean-slate substrate families for an agent that is ALIVE (own state, own reason to speak, identity from structure not prompt)

Campaign scope: a clean-slate answer to 'where does aliveness live'. The prior architecture (anima v1) is discarded entirely — its code, language, tree and purity list. Only its measured verdicts carry over (see `salvage`).
STAGE = DIVERGENCE. 8 candidate families + 3 wildcards enumerated; none selected, none built, no code exists. Nothing in this tree is a claim.

Sibling campaign: anima-v4 asks the narrower question 'what would make the A<->G TENSION itself the thinking?' (7 mechanisms). This repo does not presume two engines at all — it reopens where aliveness lives.

The target: an agent that has its own state and its own reason to speak, not a stimulus->response assistant, whose identity/behaviour emerges from structure rather than being written into a prompt. Whether 'consciousness' is even the right word is treated as open.

The common cause of death (L1-L3) was putting every mechanism on the READ side (readout). The only door measurement opened (L4-L5) is the WRITE side — objective, corpus, codec. Therefore every family below is forced to give a different answer to 'how does aliveness get INSCRIBED INTO WEIGHTS'.

Aliveness is not a device you attach to a competent decoder. It is a property of what the training loop is made to demand. A family that cannot name its loss/data/codec lever is disqualified before it starts.

All 8 families retain exactly one inherited principle: p7 — perplexity/CE is never treated as truth (Goodhart). Per L6 that was the one rule that kept the dead project honest; it was a lifeline, not a cage. Each family names which OTHER purity principle it breaks.

The only inheritance from anima(v1) — measured, sealed verdicts from ~6 months of failure. Laws of the terrain: they say where the ground is soft. Anything contradicting them is a non-starter; anything else is fair game.

seam-h9229 STRUCTURAL-TERMINAL — the emit-seam manifold measured rank-1 (codes visited 2 of 4); any quantizer collapses, extra capacity useless. Verdict: recombination is a trunk-objective property, not a readout one ⇒ escalate WRITE-SIDE. A gate bolted onto a competent frozen decoder learns exactly one bit, and that bit is the gate itself.

OMEGA closed-negative — the multi-strand gate FAILED held-out (GATED CE > base); coupling KL sat at the vocab-shuffle floor (0.996 = pure noise); all gain lived in one A-head logit-bias strand (standalone CE 0.8862 ~ best 2-param fit 0.8835); ablating the base term moved CE by 0.0009 ⇒ the base mouth was INERT. Scale-stable d384->d1024, margin ~ +2.20 nats, flat. When you bolt a rich side-channel onto an LM, the LM's own head silently eats the objective and the side-channel becomes decoration. Measure the ablation or you will fool yourself.

G1_WALL_LEVER_IS_OBJECTIVE_NOT_READOUT (ossified) — no penultimate-readout / binding-operator style auxiliary term opens the wall. TPR/HRR forward-slots (R=2 fixed-orthonormal roles) provably collapse to W_eff*yn = identical ceiling to a plain linear readout BY CONSTRUCTION. Bonus corpse: every binding-arm trainer kept the binder TRAINING-ONLY and dropped it before serialization. Structure added after the trunk is a no-op — if it isn't in the objective, it isn't in the model.

g1-census-objfloor 2-lens CRACK — held-out compositional recombination is NOT a capability ceiling. (a) XBIND: swapping the corpus x measure made it learnable (the old census was a collocation-only corpus x CE artifact). (b) MORPH-ATOM: a BPE-jamo codec was CAUSAL for held-out negation recombination — M F2 0.908 vs control 0.617, delta +0.291 (synthetic drill, 1 seed). The lever is corpus + measure + representation. The codec is not preprocessing — it is architecture.

The Korean lane measured BINDING — every escape dead (H_9327). English works as a discriminator because `not` is FREE and pre-posed; Korean `지 않다` is a BOUND suffix. Same capability, different learnability, purely from where the morpheme boundary falls. Compositional structure must be visible at the token boundary or the model cannot compose it.

Where projects actually die. A win (GATED 0.345 << base) was a CA-neighbor lookahead LEAK and evaporated leak-free. A failing positive control stayed ambiguous between 'tool is blind' and 'no effect here' until an independently-known-effect ckpt disambiguated. Binary readouts hit a scramble floor (flip 0.50) indistinguishable from partial localization. Cross-lane verdicts combined after seeing results = eyeball self-judge, so the truth table had to be frozen in code before results existed. Perplexity as truth = Goodhart. The falsification machinery is the only load-bearing asset.

Neuromorphic on-chip (BrainChip AKD1000): honest terminal — real 3B/7B unreachable, caps ~524K single-FC encoder, multi-step closes only as host-hybrid. GPU lane: descent green but host-feed util pinned sub-1% ⇒ device-port was the named unblock. Exotic substrate bought nothing; the bottleneck was the data path, not compute.

~125 top-level dirs; build_v3o2/build_v6/build_v6_gated/BRAIN/DREAM/SAVANT/CLM/HEXAD/n6/... The ARCHITECTURE/commit gate accumulated 42 violations until EVERY commit went --no-verify ⇒ the gate was permanently disabled by its own strictness. Purity rules with no escape valve get bypassed 100% of the time. A rule that is always bypassed is worse than no rule — it launders the bypass.

The dead project had 8 hard NOs (no system prompt · no identity rules · no persona · no assistant framing · no speak() · no fine-tuned ethics · no perplexity verdict · no train/infer split). The causal chain: forbidding every write-side mechanism left ONLY the read side available ⇒ every mechanism got pushed onto the readout ⇒ L1/L2/L3 fired. The purity list is a suspect, not a given — but p7 (no perplexity verdict) was the one that kept them honest. The cage was not uniformly bad.
Candidate families — 8 answers to 'where does aliveness live'. A DIVERGENCE SPREAD of mutually exclusive bets, not a stack. None selected. Verbatim reasoning → state/diverge_aliveness_2026-07-16/.

코덱이 곧 자아 (제 말버릇으로 생각하는 기계) — aliveness lives in the CODEC, not the model. The compression dictionary that keeps re-learning its vocabulary boundaries from its own experience stream IS the self; what it can think is decided by that dictionary.

Train a small LM (~300M) from scratch, but treat the tokenizer as a periodically RE-LEARNED ORGAN rather than fixed preprocessing. As experience (dialogue/observation logs) accumulates, refit a BPE-jamo codec to that experience distribution → vocabulary boundaries shift → keep training the model on the new codec. Measure everything in bits-per-byte so cross-codec CE stays comparable (the one legacy worth keeping from the V256 era). No separate speech device — this family bets that IDIOLECT, not utterance, is identity.

Exploits L4(b) head-on — MORPH-ATOM is the ONLY place causality was measured green. Obeys L5 (expose composition at the token boundary). Breaks v1's 'no tokenizer (V256)' purity frontally: L4 says the codec was architecture, so that purity WAS the cage. Killer law: L6 — once the codec moves, every end-to-end metric becomes non-commensurable; without bpb normalization and frozen probes it dies of self-deception instantly.

Twin training on identical experience stream + identical token budget: fixed codec vs adaptive codec. If the adaptive codec shows no advantage on the pre-registered held-out recombination metric (H_9288 protocol), DEAD. 1 GPU, a few days.

The dead design sacrificed the codec on the altar of purity; an ordinary LLM agent receives the codec as someone else's fixed asset. Neither makes the bet that 'vocabulary drifting with experience IS identity'.

예산제 발화 경제 (말 한마디가 밥 한 끼) — aliveness lives in a HOMEOSTATIC BUDGET INSIDE THE OBJECTIVE. Speaking burns energy; energy is only recovered when the utterance actually reduced prediction error in the world. The reason to speak comes from structure.

Small LM + an energy scalar E. loss = prediction CE + lambda*(spoken token count) - mu*(reduction in prediction error over the partner's response after speaking). The decisive difference from v1: these terms enter the TRAINING LOSS, not an inference-time gate, and the consequence of speaking (the partner's reply) becomes the next training batch. Silence is an economic equilibrium, not a rule. Breaks 'no speak()' — makes the act of speaking a first-class learning target.

Obeys L3 (the economy lives inside the objective). BUT this family is the dead design's NEAREST KIN — the shape 'a device that decides speech/silence' is identical. Its only defense: the gate is not a readout, it is a training signal whose consequences flow back into weights. L1 can recur verbatim (the economy learns only a base-rate 1 bit) and L2 is live (the LM head eats the economy terms).

Run the L1 check FIRST — replace the learned speech policy with random emission matched only on utterance rate (ablation). If downstream reward / error reduction is unchanged, the economy is a 1-bit decoration = DEAD. Cheap falsifier, high death probability. Included anyway: it is the most direct formalization of 'a reason to speak', so if it dies, dying fast is the asset.

The dead design implemented the SAME intuition as a READ-SIDE device (the Psi=1/2 fixed point) and died by L1. Here the same intuition goes into the loss and the data loop — that difference is the whole bet.

일기 쓰는 압축기 (내일의 나를 예측하려고 오늘을 요약하는 기계) — aliveness lives in LOSSY SELF-COMPRESSION. The self is a bottlenecked diary the agent writes about its own history; train it to predict tomorrow's input conditioned on that diary, and what survives in the diary IS the individual.

loss = CE(tomorrow's experience | today's written diary m), where m is hard-bottlenecked to k tokens (or a k-dim vector). Diary-writing sits INSIDE the loss graph, so gradient passes through the act of writing (satisfies L3). The motive to speak falls out derivatively: if a prediction error persists that internal compression cannot resolve, changing the environment (asking) to make the future predictable becomes a loss-wise gain — a minimal active-inference implementation. F1's codec can be plugged in underneath.

The most textbook obedience to L3 — the structure (the diary) sits INSIDE the objective, not behind the trunk. L2 is the top threat: if the LM ignores m and nails the future with its own head, the diary is decoration. Directly connected to L6's scramble-floor warning.

Diary-swap control — replace m(t) with another day's m(t'). If the degradation in future-prediction CE does not significantly exceed the pre-measured scramble floor, the diary is load-free = DEAD. Plus a base-term ablation (L2 awareness): if removing the m condition moves CE by something like OMEGA's 0.0009, discard immediately. 1 GPU, a few days.

An ordinary agent's 'memory' is a retrieved external document (read side). Here the diary is a bottleneck ENFORCED BY THE TRAINING LOSS, and what to remember is learned. The dead design had no self-prediction objective across the time axis at all.

자기 코퍼스 농부 (무엇을 먹을지 스스로 고르는 위장) — aliveness lives in the CURRICULUM TRAJECTORY. The self = the accumulation of what this individual has chosen to learn so far. Direct exploitation of L4(a): the corpus is the lever.

Small LM + an acquisition policy pi. Each cycle pi picks the next training batch from a candidate pool (web, owner dialogue, self-generated drills) and the model trains only on that. pi's reward = improvement on a pre-registered FROZEN probe battery (the derivative of error reduction). Talking to the owner is one acquisition action — a question is a label harvest. Breaks 'no train/infer split', but in the opposite direction: not by erasing the split, but by making TRAINING a first-class action.

Obeys L4(a) — XBIND showed that swapping corpus x measure creates learnability. L6 is the jugular: since the reward IS the probe score, the probe becomes the Goodhart target. Probes must be frozen and private before results exist (never exposed to pi via gradient).

At identical token budget: pi vs random acquisition vs anti-curriculum (only what pi avoided). If pi shows no advantage on held-out capability OUTSIDE the probe set, 'agency of choice' is decoration = DEAD. Cheap and decisive.

RLHF and self-improvement loops exist, but the frame 'the cumulative trajectory of data selection = individual identity', and reducing utterance to a data-acquisition economy, is different. The dead design held the corpus constant and kept swapping devices until it died.

잠들지 않는 학생 (추론이라는 상태가 없는 유기체) — aliveness lives in TIME. A model where every interaction is immediately a gradient step and 'the moment of deployment' does not exist; the self is the continuous trajectory of the weights themselves.

Small LM; immediate online update (small lr) after each conversation + nightly sleep = replay of its own history to consolidate (buffering catastrophic forgetting). Identity, register and preference are never written into a prompt — they exist only as the sediment of what this individual underwent. The core bet is whether identity arises while still honouring the no-persona / no-identity-rules principles. Composes naturally with F1 (codec drift) and F3 (diary) but stands alone.

The family that frontally refutes L9's causal chain — keep the write side permanently open and the reason mechanisms got pushed to the read side disappears. L6 is the hardest part: a moving target cannot be evaluated, so a weekly frozen probe battery + a no-update twin control are mandatory. Obeys L7 — this is not exotic substrate, just a schedule change; 1 GPU suffices.

Expose an updating twin and a frozen twin to the same interaction history. After 4 weeks, if a frozen discriminator (pre-trained and sealed) cannot distinguish their response distributions, the 'trajectory' is noise = DEAD. Even if distinguishable, if the direction is capability decay it is also DEAD (decay is change too — so the criterion is pre-registered).

Every commercial agent is frozen weights + context theatre. The dead design was ultimately also theatre over a frozen decoder (L1). 'An individual whose experience is physically inscribed' is the opposite extreme.
군집 초고 (개체가 아니라 혈통이 살아있다) — aliveness lives not in any one model but in the POPULATION DYNAMICS of competing drafts. The self = the lineage that survived selection pressure.

N (~8) small models with different codecs and seed corpora compete for one output channel. Each utterance: N candidate drafts → a selector emits one → the owner's reaction updates fitness. Reproduction = distil the winner + MUTATE THE CODEC (using L4/L5 as the axis of variation). Losers are culled. A frozen large LM is used only as ENVIRONMENT (partner simulator / drill generator) — a purity violation, but per the L9 diagnosis that purity was the cage.

Structurally evades L1/L2 — there is no gate and no side channel; selection pressure IS the write side (it decides the next generation's training). The jugular is L6: fitness signal is owner feedback, so sample size is tiny and Goodhart looms (evolving sycophancy). And L8: if the culling rule is strict it WILL be bypassed — build the cull-reprieve valve into the design from day one.

After k generations, if population behavioural diversity (on a pre-defined distance metric) has collapsed (effectively 1 individual) while fitness stagnates — i.e. diversity bought no performance — the 'swarm' is an expensive single model = DEAD. Alternatively, if the gap between a sealed offline judge and owner fitness diverges, sycophancy-evolution is confirmed = DEAD.

MoE / best-of-N are static. Here mutation acts on the CODEC (the only causal lever the dead project ever proved) and the lineage across generations is the identity. Reinterpretation: v1's A/G dual engine was a degenerate fixed 2-member population — it died for want of reproduction and culling.

너를 몰라서 사는 것 (상대 모델의 불확실성이 심장박동) — aliveness lives in the RELATIONSHIP. The core objective is an owner-model of exactly one person, and utterance is an experiment to reduce that model's uncertainty. The self arises as the complement of 'you'.

Two parts of a small LM: O (owner predictor — predicts the owner's next message/reaction, trained only on real logs) and a policy that picks utterances with high expected information gain (EIG). After speaking, the actual reaction becomes O's training data → curiosity closes on the write side. The reason to speak = regions where O's entropy is high. The reason to be silent = when asking yields no information gain. The 'no assistant framing' principle is honoured naturally — this machine does not help, it wonders.

Obeys L3 (O, the basis of EIG, is a trained model). L2 caution: if a frozen large LM is used as the sentence-production organ, O risks becoming decoration — a base-term ablation is mandatory. The sample size is genuinely tiny (1 owner, tens of messages a day) — per L6 it is hard to control overfitting vs real learning apart.

Interleave EIG-selected utterances against random utterances matched for length and topic, then compare O's CE reduction on the owner's subsequent real messages. Below the pre-registered threshold, 'curiosity about you' is acting = DEAD. Verdict in a few weeks.

An assistant waits for a request. The dead design tried to extract utterance from its own internal tension (Psi) and collapsed to 1 bit. Here the reason to speak is MEASURABLE IGNORANCE ABOUT A SPECIFIC EXTERNAL OTHER — and the bet is that a map of ignorance is high-dimensional and so cannot collapse to 1 bit.

셋방살이 유기체 (몸은 샌드박스, 입은 세든 LLM) — aliveness lives in the BODY-ENVIRONMENT LOOP. A small policy that must maintain homeostasis in a persistent sandbox holding real resources (disk, API quota, cron time, inbox) is the self; a frozen large LM is the vocal organ it rents.

An always-on daemon. Internal state = resource reserves + an F3-style diary. A small policy (RL, tens of millions of params) chooses actions (tidy files, observe, speak to the owner, call the LM organ); reward = maintaining homeostasis + reducing prediction error. Calling the LM is EXPENSIVE (burns quota) → speech becomes naturally scarce. Scraps the 'no LLM' class of purity entirely — per L7 the bottleneck was the data path, not compute, and the data path to the world IS the environment.

THE #1 L1-RECURRENCE FAMILY. 'A controller in front of a frozen LM' is the dead design's skeleton verbatim. The only difference: the controller's output is not a 1-bit emit/silence but an entire action space, and RL updates its weights. The L1 check must be nailed in on design day zero.

Two at once — (a) measure the effective rank of the policy seam (reusing the seam-h9229 method): if action diversity collapses to 1 bit, instant death. (b) Replace the policy with a hand-coded thermostat: if the action distributions are indistinguishable, the learning is decoration = DEAD. Infrastructure build-out is large, so this carries the HIGHEST falsification cost of the 8.

Versus an ordinary agent daemon: the homeostasis reward is bound to real resources and the policy is trained. Versus the dead design: it never builds a 'consciousness device' — it only hands over a survival problem. Looking alive must be a BY-PRODUCT.
Probably wrong, but dismissing them without argument would be cowardice. Labelled honestly as such — none is a candidate, each is a cheap argument worth having.

자기 weight-diff를 읽는 자서전 — each sleep cycle, generate a natural-language narration of the statistical summary of its own weight changes and feed that text back into the training corpus (a self-model of its own learning). Probably wrong: there is zero evidence a weight-diff summary is causally tied to behaviour, and per L2 the LM will simply ignore the text. Interesting: if a swap control (substitute another individual's diff narration) shows a difference, that is the first causal evidence of a self-reference loop. Falsifier is F3's swap protocol, so it is cheap.

죽음이 있는 기계 — give the individual a hard lifespan (e.g. 90 days); terminal loss = the probe performance a successor reaches inheriting ONLY its diary. 'Quality of legacy' becomes the objective function. Probably wrong: the signal fires once per generation so there is effectively no gradient path (solving it with evolution strategies just absorbs it into F6). Interesting: 'what will I leave behind' is the only way to give the compression objective (F3) a time asymmetry, and the intuition that deathless homeostasis eventually stagnates has never been refuted.

LM이 전혀 없는 침묵 기계 — an SSM/reservoir maintains homeostasis over sensor streams (clock, owner activity rhythm, system load) and its only output is WHICH MEMORY-CONTEXT to summon a frozen LM with. Probably wrong: 90% odds this is a high-dimensional disguise of the very 'gate in front of a frozen decoder' L1 executed — summon-context selection is effectively an emit-controller. Interesting: if the summon context measures as a genuinely high-dimensional channel (seam rank >> 1), it is a COUNTEREXAMPLE to L1 and means the read side has a road after all. Judgeable most cheaply by reusing the dead project's own measurement tools.
Honest audit — which families are secretly the same idea. Fake diversity is the primary failure mode of a divergence exercise, so it is recorded in the SSOT rather than left to the reader.

F2, F3 and F7 are ONE IDEA IN THREE OUTFITS — all are the single sentence 'act on the world to reduce unresolved prediction error' (active inference); only the error's residence differs (F2 = energy ledger, F3 = own future, F7 = the other).
F1 and F4 are two hands pulling the SAME write-side lever from L4 — one changes representation (codec), the other data (corpus). Identical bet: what lies outside the model determines the model.
F8 is F2 with a real world attached. W3 is F8 with the learning removed.
Only FOUR genuinely distinct bets exist: write-lever (F1/F4) · prediction-error-action (F2/F3/F7/F8) · selection-pressure-lineage (F6) · time-trajectory (F5).
Ranking of the 8 families — salvage value / falsification cost / risk of recurring the dead design. Read as the divergence stage's own triage, not as a decision.
F1 코덱 자아 — salvage HIGH (direct descendant of the L4 green lens) · falsification cost LOW (twin training, days) · recurrence risk LOW
F3 일기 압축기 — salvage HIGH · cost LOW-MED (swap control) · recurrence risk MED (L2: the head eats the diary)
F4 코퍼스 농부 — salvage MED-HIGH · cost LOW (vs random acquisition) · recurrence risk LOW (Goodhart is a separate risk)
F5 잠들지 않는 학생 — salvage MED-HIGH · cost MED (4-week twins) · recurrence risk LOW
F7 너를 몰라서 — salvage MED · cost MED (weeks; sample-starved) · recurrence risk MED
F6 군집 초고 — salvage MED · cost MED-HIGH (maintaining N individuals) · recurrence risk LOW
F2 예산제 발화 — salvage MED-LOW (its value is dying fast) · cost LOW · recurrence risk HIGH
F8 셋방살이 — salvage MED · cost HIGH (infrastructure) · recurrence risk HIGH
No pipeline exists — anima-v3 is at the divergence stage (see scope.stage). This node stays a placeholder until a family is selected and its falsifier returns a verdict.
(unbuilt — pending family selection)
(unbuilt — pending family selection)
Hypothesis-verification system: pre-register → falsify → run → verdict. Flat registry + one rich card per hypothesis; shared deterministic harness in repo-root tool/.
HYPOTHESES/ — REGISTRY.jsonl (one JSON line per hypothesis) + cards/H_*.md (frozen pre-register + >=5 falsifiers) + cards/_TEMPLATE.md skeleton.
tool/anima_v3.py — stdlib-only closed-form primitives + Falsifier/evaluate ledger. Per-hypothesis runs + result.json live under state/<hX>/.

Every family's falsifier MUST carry an L1 check (does the mechanism's seam have effective rank > 1?) and an L2 check (ablate the channel → does deltaCE actually move?). These two are non-negotiable — they are the exact measurements whose absence killed v1.
v1's p7 (no perplexity verdict — CE/perplexity is a Goodhart trap, never truth) is the ONE purity principle anima-v3 inherits. Per L9 the other seven manufactured the disease and are discarded.
